## Job description

### About the role
Design surfaces across Linear's core product. Partner with engineering and PM to ship at a high bar.

### What you'll do
- Ship multiple features per quarter
- Maintain the design system
- Run user research as part of the loop

## Application form responses

### Why Linear?
Linear sets the bar for product polish in the dev-tools category. The mission of giving software teams a tool that actually respects their attention lines up with what I've spent years working on, and the small remote-first team is the tempo I do my best work in.

[synthesized from: answer-bank/beliefs/mission-fit.md, companies/interested/linear.md]

### Tell us about a project you're proud of
I led the rebuild of our internal design system across six product surfaces. The biggest unlock was getting engineering to trust the tokens, which doubled UI shipping cadence within a quarter.

[synthesized from: answer-bank/beliefs/mission-fit.md]
